languages.text: "Я не думал{mf||а} отыскать живым. Мы в ловушке, и нам надо бежать".

traits.locale_text: "Я не думал{mf||а} отыскать живым. Мы в ловушке, и нам надо бежать".

languages.text: "I never thought I would find you alive. We are caught in a trap, and we must flee."
languages.original_text: "Я не думал{mf||а} отыскать живым. Мы в ловушке, и нам надо бежать".

traits.locale_text: "I never thought I would find you alive. We are caught in a trap, and we must flee."
"I never thought I would find you alive. We are caught in a trap, and we must flee."
"I never thought I would find you alive. We are caught in a trap, and we must flee."

languages.text: “真没想到还能见到活着的你。我们中了圈套，必须马上撤离。”
languages.original_text: "I never thought I would find you alive. We are caught in a trap, and we must flee."

traits.locale_text: “真没想到还能见到活着的你。我们中了圈套，必须马上撤离。”

languages.text: « Je n'aurais jamais pensé vous trouver en vie. Nous sommes pris au piège, et nous devons à tout prix nous échapper. »
languages.original_text: "I never thought I would find you alive. We are caught in a trap, and we must flee."

traits.locale_text: « Je n'aurais jamais pensé vous trouver en vie. Nous sommes pris au piège, et nous devons à tout prix nous échapper. »

languages.text: "Seni capcanlı karşımda göreceğim aklımın ucundan bile geçmemişti. Tuzağa düştük, kaçmamız gerekiyor."
languages.original_text: "I never thought I would find you alive. We are caught in a trap, and we must flee."

traits.locale_text: "Seni capcanlı karşımda göreceğim aklımın ucundan bile geçmemişti. Tuzağa düştük, kaçmamız gerekiyor."

languages.text: «No pensaba que lo encontraría vivo. Hemos caído en una trampa y debemos escapar».
languages.original_text: "I never thought I would find you alive. We are caught in a trap, and we must flee."

traits.locale_text: «No pensaba que lo encontraría vivo. Hemos caído en una trampa y debemos escapar».

languages.text: "Ich hätte nie erwartet, Euch lebend zu finden. Wir sind in einer Falle gefangen und müssen fliehen."
languages.original_text: "I never thought I would find you alive. We are caught in a trap, and we must flee."

traits.locale_text: "Ich hätte nie erwartet, Euch lebend zu finden. Wir sind in einer Falle gefangen und müssen fliehen."

languages.text: 「生きているなんて思ってもみなかった。罠にはまったから、逃げるしかない」
languages.original_text: "I never thought I would find you alive. We are caught in a trap, and we must flee."

traits.locale_text: 「生きているなんて思ってもみなかった。罠にはまったから、逃げるしかない」
